name: referenced-uri-handling
description: Referenced artifact URI handling per pack.md Section 4.3 and 4.4
optional_note: This entire test file is OPTIONAL. Referenced artifact support is an optional feature per pack.md Section 4.1. Implementations that do not support referenced artifacts MAY skip all tests in this file.

digest_verification_tests.name: digest_present_bytes_match
digest_verification_tests.description: Fetched bytes match digest - verification passes

digest_verification_tests.name: digest_present_bytes_mismatch
digest_verification_tests.description: Fetched bytes do not match digest - MUST report verification failure

digest_verification_tests.name: digest_absent_not_verified
digest_verification_tests.description: No digest - MUST clearly indicate reference was not verified

digest_verification_tests.name: publisher_should_include_digest
digest_verification_tests.description: Publishers who can provide stable bytes SHOULD include digest

uri_safety_tests.name: no_auto_fetch
uri_safety_tests.description: Clients MUST NOT automatically fetch external URIs

uri_safety_tests.name: requires_explicit_approval
uri_safety_tests.description: Explicit user approval or policy allowlist required

uri_safety_tests.name: uri_https_required
uri_safety_tests.description: External URI scheme MUST be https

uri_safety_tests.name: uri_with_userinfo_rejected
uri_safety_tests.description: URIs with userinfo MUST be rejected

uri_safety_tests.name: uri_with_fragment_rejected
uri_safety_tests.description: URIs with fragments MUST be rejected

uri_safety_tests.name: uri_private_network_rejected
uri_safety_tests.description: Private network ranges SHOULD be rejected

uri_safety_tests.name: redirect_revalidates
uri_safety_tests.description: Redirects SHOULD re-validate scheme and host restrictions

uri_safety_tests.name: redirect_to_private_rejected
uri_safety_tests.description: Redirect to private network SHOULD be rejected

uri_safety_tests.name: no_cross_origin_auth
uri_safety_tests.description: MUST NOT send Authorization headers to different origin

uri_safety_tests.name: credentials_redacted_in_logs
uri_safety_tests.description: MUST redact access tokens from logs and error messages

notes: Per pack.md Section 4.3 and 4.4: Referenced artifacts are informational pointers. Fetching requires explicit approval and URI safety checks. Referenced artifact support is OPTIONAL per pack.md Section 4.1.
